coding.display: metformin hydrochloride 500 MG Extended Release Oral Tablet

dosageInstruction.text: Take one tablet by mouth twice daily with meals.
Take one extended release tablet by mouth daily.
Inhale two puffs every four hours as needed for wheezing.
Use one vial by nebulizer every six hours as needed.
Take one tablet by mouth every evening.

coding.display: Left ventricular ejection fraction by US

resource.valueString: Patient reports fasting readings mostly under 140.
